docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,478.00 FILED BY KEVIN SULLIVAN HEATING & AIR AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON BROOKS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
